headline: There Is An Anti ESG Energy ETF That Will Capture Every Explosive Move When Oil Gets Volatile
summary: Most energy ETFs quietly filter out companies that don’t meet certain environmental standards. Strive U.S. Energy ETF (NYSEARCA:DRLL) does the opposite. It holds every major U.S. fossil fuel producer without exclusion, making it one of the purest oil price plays available in ETF form. headline: Chevron’s Middle East Shift Puts Geopolitical Risk At Center Stage
summary: Chevron temporarily shut the Leviathan gas field in Israel after government orders linked to rising military conflict involving the US, Israel, and Iran. The shutdown directly affects Chevron’s regional gas operations and exposes the company to heightened geopolitical and supply risk. At the same time, Chevron has secured new oil contracts in Iraq, including roles in fields such as West Qurna 2, following the exit of Russian firms.
